name: Nippon Kanryu Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Nippon Kanryu Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the construction business. The company is involved in the traffic safety facilities, landscape, and other construction works, as well as civil engineering, law related disaster prevention, and river and sabo related works. It also sells materials related to various construction works; disaster prevention goods; and industrial safety and health supplies, as well as provides structure repair related services. In addition, the company produces chemicals, such as insoluble sulfur, as well as manufactures natural soil herbs. Nippon Kanryu Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.
